Paraprasophyllum holzingeri is a species of orchid native to Australia.
taxonomy: Paraprasophyllum holzingeri is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to Australia. This species is a member of the genus Paraprasophyllum, which is part of the subtribe Thelchiinae within the orchid family. More specifically, Paraprasophyllum holzingeri can be classified as a flowering plant in the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, and family Orchidaceae. Further, its classification also includes the order Orchidales and family Orchidaceae, with the subfamily Orchidoideae.
